summary: Single-surface word-review flashcard flow. App boots directly into the review page (no bottom tab). A central flashcard shows the English word; tapping flips it 3D to reveal Chinese meaning + phonetic. 「认识」 dequeues the card and increments correctCount; 「不认识」 moves the card to the queue tail. When the queue drains, a completion overlay shows the round's correct count and a restart entry. When the current stage has no words, an empty state is shown.

Word.description: A learned word from the current stage's word bank.

fields.id: string — stable unique id (used for queue identity / dedup)

computedState.currentWord: Word | null — the card currently on top of the queue (ui-tree binding currentWord)
computedState.remainingCount: number — number of cards still in the queue (binding remainingCount)
computedState.correctCount: number — cards marked 认识 this round (binding correctCount)
computedState.totalCount: number — cards in the round when it started
computedState.isFlipped: boolean — whether the current card shows its back face (ui-tree state 'flipped')
computedState.isQueueEmpty: boolean — current stage word bank produced no cards (binding isQueueEmpty)
computedState.isComplete: boolean — round finished (queue drained AND round had at least one card) (binding isComplete)

persistenceRelevant.note: MVP round state is in-memory. The word bank is read from a local rawfile JSON resource. No cross-round progress persistence is required for this version (spec section 7 & 9).

WordBankService.purpose: Loads the current stage's learned words from local storage (rawfile JSON word bank).

interface.loadStage(stageId: string): Word[]: Returns the word list for the given stage; returns [] when the stage has no words (drives empty state).
interface.defaultStageId(): string: Returns the current/active stage id used by the review flow.

WordBankService.dataStrategy: Local JSON resource under rawfile. This is the product's word library (the data source named by spec section 7), NOT HTML demo data. The empty-state path is real and exercised when the bank yields zero words.
WordBankService.fallback: If the resource cannot be parsed, return [] so the empty state renders instead of crashing.

states.loading: Reading the word bank for the current stage.
states.empty: isQueueEmpty === true: no words to review. Shows EmptyState.
states.review: Active review. A current card is shown; isFlipped toggles face. 认识/不认识 advance the queue.
states.complete: isComplete === true: queue drained after a non-empty round. Shows CompletionOverlay.

transitions.effect: dequeue current card; correctCount++; advance; if queue now empty -> complete
move current card to queue tail; do NOT change correctCount or remainingCount; reset isFlipped=false; advance to next top card

interactionFlows.name: flip-card
steps: Card plays 3D flip animation; back face shows review-word-back-meaning + review-word-back-phonetic.
Tapping again flips back to front.
interactionFlows.expectedState: isFlipped toggled; currentWord unchanged; counts unchanged.
interactionFlows.errorPath: If currentWord is null (no card), toggle-flip is a no-op.

interactionFlows.name: mark-known
steps: Dequeue (remove) the current card from the queue.
Reset isFlipped = false for the next card.
If queue is now empty AND totalCount >= 1 -> isComplete = true (complete state).
Otherwise advance to the new top card.
interactionFlows.expectedState: remainingCount decreased by 1; correctCount increased by 1; new currentWord is next card or null(complete).

interactionFlows.name: mark-unknown
steps: Move the current card to the tail of the queue (FIFO requeue).
Do NOT change remainingCount (card stays in the round).
Advance to the next top card (the card that was second).
interactionFlows.expectedState: Queue rotated; remainingCount unchanged; correctCount unchanged; currentWord is the next card.
interactionFlows.errorPath: If only one card remains, mark-unknown requeues it to itself (top stays same card); UI should still reset flip and is safe.

interactionFlows.name: complete-and-restart
steps: Reload the stage word list via WordBankService.
If empty -> empty state; else -> review with fresh queue.

assertState.description: Card back face visible after toggle-flip

changeRequests.note: Spec section 6 explicitly requires NO bottom tab and direct boot into the review page. The scaffold ships a fixed multi-tab BottomTabBar shell. Per spec, visual integration must collapse the shell to a single review surface (route pages/Review) rather than preserving the multi-tab BottomTabBar. Flagged here per contract; resolve during visual integration.
